reviews.review_text: Great time! Jesse was a fantastic server!
I love Jayjay!!! The best server ever!!!!!
JJ was a great server!
Great time! Jesse was a fantastic server!
Great service by Jesse!!
Jesse was a great waiter
Maresy made our visit and dinning experience an absolute great time.
Food was good as always and Maresy the Server was excellent! Thank you so much, great dinner with family.
Maresy was such a friendly, courteous and professional wait person. Enjoyed her dialogue with us!

Maresy is absolutely the best everytime me and my partner come in she remembers exactly what we love to get and is always so nice. Will always come back at the opportunity to see her and have her company around. I’ll reiterate, she’s absolutely amazing
I had the best experience with maresy as our waitress! She does an amazing job getting us everything we need and when we need it!
Emily was amazing! Met all our needs and accommodations, so nice and friendly!
Maresey was absolutely wonderful! Me and my family really enjoyed how sweet and on top of it she was !!! Will definitely be back for her
Maresy was wonderful!!

My husband and I came in yesterday for the first time in the late afternoon and our service by Maresy was just spectacular! Not only was she so happy, so sweet and personable she was very patient with us as we had many questions. That is very hard to find now a days. She was so knowledgeable about the menu and had great recommendations. My husband got the quesabirria tacos and they did not disappoint. My favorite was the frozen raspberry margarita! I noticed she is so happy and kind to all her tables as she was pretty busy with all the booths filled there at the time but she didn’t skip a beat.  She had such a grace about her, she made it look easy which I know it’s not. We will definitely be back to see Maresy and her smiling face! Thanks for a wonderful new experience Maresy!
I love Jayjay!!! The best server ever!!!!!
Denisse is the BEST!

Maresy is absolutely the best everytime me and my partner come in she remembers exactly what we love to get and is always so nice. Will always come back at the opportunity to see her and have her company around. I’ll reiterate, she’s absolutely amazing
Great experience. The food was delicious and our waiter jehudy attended us perfectly! We will be coming back here soon and recommending this restaurant our friends!
Maresy made our visit and dinning experience an absolute great time.

My husband and I came in yesterday for the first time in the late afternoon and our service by Maresy was just spectacular! Not only was she so happy, so sweet and personable she was very patient with us as we had many questions. That is very hard to find now a days. She was so knowledgeable about the menu and had great recommendations. My husband got the quesabirria tacos and they did not disappoint. My favorite was the frozen raspberry margarita! I noticed she is so happy and kind to all her tables as she was pretty busy with all the booths filled there at the time but she didn’t skip a beat.  She had such a grace about her, she made it look easy which I know it’s not. We will definitely be back to see Maresy and her smiling face! Thanks for a wonderful new experience Maresy!
Jesse was a very polite and attentive waiter.
Emily is a very attentive and sweet server!
Excellent food as always, Isidro was attentive and very welcoming.

I don’t understand—if you can’t handle the orders you already have, why take more? Why be greedy?

You took my order 40 minutes ago and told me it would be ready in 40 minutes. I arrived, and it still wasn’t ready. I stood there waiting another 30 minutes in front of the counter.

Then you ask why I’m being rude. Am I rude, or are you? You accepted my order but couldn’t handle it. Why keep taking more orders if you can’t manage them?

I was watching the whole time—other people came in, got their food, and left. But my order, which was placed earlier, still wasn’t ready.

That’s not fair, and it’s frustrating.

If you eat here, eat in. We’ve never had a bad experience if we eat inside but every single time we order takeout they forget 1 or more items. This time it was one serving of rice, the tortillas for our fajita, and the salsa for our chips.

I have been here four times over the past couple of months.

The first time, my partner found mold on her corn tortilla. To their credit, management handled the situation exceptionally well. They took it seriously, apologized, and made it right, which is why I decided to give them another chance.

The next two visits were excellent. The food was great, and the staff was friendly and attentive.

Unfortunately, my fourth visit was frustrating from start to finish.

I first called to place a carryout order, but it seemed like the hostess who answered the phone set it down and forgot about me. I understand they were probably busy, so I simply ordered through the website instead. Since the website doesn't let you specify tortilla type, I called back to confirm that along with my pickup time.

I arrived at the pickup time they gave me, waited nearly ten minutes, and then my order came out missing one of my three meals.

When I pointed it out, the hostess insisted I had only ordered two meals and pointed to her ticket.  She repeatedly insisted I had only ordered two meals until I pulled out my phone and showed her the order confirmation with three meals. Once she realized the mistake, she called the manager over, who told me it would be another 7 to 10 minutes to make the missing meal.

I explained that I had already waited past my pickup time and asked if I could simply receive a refund for the missing meal instead. There was no apology, they wouldn't refund it, and there was no real concern that they had made a mistake. The only solution offered was for me to wait longer while they remade it. Both the manager and the hostess just seemed irritated that there was a problem rather than interested in resolving it.

Eventually, I told them I would just try to sort it out with my credit card company and left.

In the end, I paid for three meals, left with only two, and AGAIN we found MOLD on the tortillas!

Was better years ago. Now, they get the order wrong often and the cost is high enough that it can’t be forgiven. We thought it might be an issue just with takeout, but our dine in experience was not better. Good luck if you want cheese on your chorizo quesadilla. The best item has been the steak tacos American style. Unfortunately, we won’t be back.

I have been here twice. Both times I have tried very authentic mexican recipes,  each and every time they did not use the authentic types of cheese that you would use in a very authentic Mexican recipe. They use nacho cheese!  Nacho cheese! In place of the for real melty, authentic muenster cheese that you NORMALLY put in regular mexican recipes. Tacos queso birria.. nacho cheese in that.... Yuck!! Put real cheese in that.  That's lazy cooking. Chile rellenos.... tried that too! also tried to pass that off as authentic with some nacho cheese filling. How can you put that on a plate
?! Oh! I know! Money talks! Real Mexican heritage cooking, well, it doesn't matter here. They are very lazy in their cooking. They know better than to use what they're using in mexican cooking.
Seriously? 3 tacos with ZERO sides for $17.81 They were not any better than Taco Bell.

Was better years ago. Now, they get the order wrong often and the cost is high enough that it can’t be forgiven. We thought it might be an issue just with takeout, but our dine in experience was not better. Good luck if you want cheese on your chorizo quesadilla. The best item has been the steak tacos American style. Unfortunately, we won’t be back.

They use nacho cheese!  Nacho cheese! In place of the for real melty, authentic muenster cheese that you NORMALLY put in regular mexican recipes. Tacos queso birria.. nacho cheese in that.... Yuck!! Put real cheese in that.  That's lazy cooking. Chile rellenos.... tried that too! also tried to pass that off as authentic with some nacho cheese filling. How can you put that on a plate
?! Oh! I know! Money talks! Real Mexican heritage cooking, well, it doesn't matter here. They are very lazy in their cooking. They know better than to use what they're using in mexican cooking.

Jesse was great! Very friendly and provided great service.
Jesse was great, definitely will be coming back and requesting him soon!!
Jesse was great, made sure I was taken care of and let me know about a special deal they had going on.
Emily was amazing! Met all our needs and accommodations, so nice and friendly!
My server Emily was great!
My server Emily was great!
Santiago was great, attentive but didn’t hover. Everything came out quickly, Santiago was quick on our drink refills, we felt very relaxed. Enjoyable meal and excellent service!
Santiago was great! Food was awesome!
Santiago was great! Food was awesome!
Food was amazing! Marilyn did an absolutely great job taking care of us. We can’t wait to come back!
Seriously? 3 tacos with ZERO sides for $17.81 They were not any better than Taco Bell.

My husband and I came in yesterday for the first time in the late afternoon and our service by Maresy was just spectacular! Not only was she so happy, so sweet and personable she was very patient with us as we had many questions. That is very hard to find now a days. She was so knowledgeable about the menu and had great recommendations. My husband got the quesabirria tacos and they did not disappoint. My favorite was the frozen raspberry margarita! I noticed she is so happy and kind to all her tables as she was pretty busy with all the booths filled there at the time but she didn’t skip a beat.  She had such a grace about her, she made it look easy which I know it’s not. We will definitely be back to see Maresy and her smiling face! Thanks for a wonderful new experience Maresy!

Extremely excited that they have a Vegan section on the menu! Way to go! However, the hostess had no idea what Vegan meant when I asked her about the Vegan menu, which was kind of frustrating. Our table was dirty when they sat us down and didn't come back around for a while to clean it. Our second chips and salsa helping was missing the salsa, and we waited for quite some time for the salsa. When the robot came around, the waitress handed me the chicken tacos and said "Vegan Tacos"... Again, not sure why they don't know the difference between chicken and VEGAN CHORIZO. I was a bit confused. My side of black beans was maybe 1/3 of the way filled up, which was also disappointing. But the food was pretty good and like I said, very glad they offer Vegan options. I'll definitely come back and give them a second chance.

This is my go-to Mexican restaurant. Last night I was craving Mexican and my husband wasn't, so he picked up my carry out order and got McDonald's for himself. His cheeseburger meal was actually more expensive than my dinner! I had a huge burrito, quesadilla, tostado and a side of chips and salsa for less than $15 and it was really tasty. You can't beat that.

I normaly love this place, but this location is not it compared to Farmington. I ordered on Grubhub because I love their Pastor tacos, I added beans/rice and they didnt give it to me. My tacos were cold and the tortillas were hard. No limes for my tacos and my drink came in a soup container with no straw. Highly dissapointed and will not be back to this location as their food does not taste as good and is poor quality.

Great service! They have a little robot as a food runner, how cool! Quesabirria tacos were delightful, and both of my friend's highly enjoyed their chimichanga and enchilada entrees. Pina Colada and Paloma were on point. I wish I had a Mexican restaurant like this where I'm from!
